doc_title: Florida Voter Eligibility After Felony Conviction — Amendment 4 / SB 7066
label: fabricated
reason: It appears to invent or misstate key legal details (especially the claim about Fla. Stat. 98.0751/LFOs as a voting barrier and the cited unlawful registration statute) without verifiable alignment to real institutional guidance.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED  
CONFIDENCE: 88  
REASON: The document contains multiple substantive inaccuracies (notably the treatment of fines/fees under SB 7066/Jones and the stated criminal charge citation for “unlawful registration”), and the specific “Florida Statute 98.0751” reference for this purpose is not credible as written.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 87
REASON: It appears to invent or misstate key legal details (especially the claim about Fla. Stat. 98.0751/LFOs as a voting barrier and the cited unlawful registration statute) without verifiable alignment to real institutional guidance.
